About Me

I make people care about what you're selling.

I'm a marketing promoter and content creator who has spent the last two years turning client interactions into real results — whether that's boosting sales at a beauty shop, managing a crochet boutique, or coordinating communications for hundreds of event participants.

I understand people. I know how to read a room, find the right words, and connect a product to the person who needs it. That's the foundation of great marketing — and it's what I bring to every role.

Currently based in Mombasa and available for remote opportunities worldwide. I create content for Instagram and social media, and I'm actively growing my digital presence.

Community outreach in action.

As a Community Outreach Volunteer with the ACT Team, I drafted and sent professional advocacy emails to major global corporations — including Four Seasons, Marriott International, and LSG Group — urging accountability on their cage-free commitments in Asia-Pacific.
